title: isotrema fangchi
intro: Isotrema fangchi, also known as Fang Chi or Tu Fu Ling, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Aristolochiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Isotrema fangchi include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-aging properties, as well as its use in treating conditions such as arthritis and respiratory issues. Isotrema fangchi is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in capsule or powder form, often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
